metadata.name: Bank exposure network (real anchor)
metadata.source: Real anchor: roster of large banks + non-financial corporates (data/external/banks/gsib_roster.csv). Marginals: Moody's Corporate Default & Recovery Rates 1920-2004, Exhibit 17 (whole-letter, Year-1). Correlation: Yahoo Finance daily adjusted close, log-return correlation (2021-06-01..2024-06-01).

fields.name: marginal_default_prob
fields.description: p_i: 1-year marginal default probability from rating.

fields.name: capital_buffer
fields.description: Tier-1-style loss-absorbing buffer used by the cascade.

fields.name: interbank_assets
fields.description: Total interbank claims (row-sum constraint for edges).

fields.name: interbank_liabilities
fields.description: Total interbank liabilities (col-sum constraint for edges).

fields.name: exposure_matrix
fields.description: W[i,j] = loss to i if j defaults (reconstructed bilateral).

fields.name: cluster
fields.description: Community label from detection on the network.

metadata.provenance_notes: Bilateral exposures are reconstructed (real bilateral data is confidential) and risk-adjusted into an effective-loss matrix (LGD/maturity/wrong-way/substitutability); marginals and equity correlation are empirical. Corporates borrow from banks but do not lend interbank (directed bank->corporate edges).
